name: Leading Edge Materials Corp.
description: Leading Edge Materials Corp. is a Canadian public company focused on developing a portfolio of critical raw material projects within the European Union. The company's assets include the Norra Kärr heavy rare earth element project and the Woxna graphite mine in Sweden, as well as the Bihor Sud nickel-cobalt exploration project in Romania. By operating exclusively within EU borders, the company aims to provide a secure, domestic supply of materials essential for the energy transition, electric vehicle batteries, and permanent magnets, thereby supporting European strategic autonomy and resource independence.
